revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23984597483|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ca:Fujiwara no Tadabumi]][[es:Fujiwara no Tadabumi]][[eu:Fujiwara no Tadabumi]][[fa:فوجیوارا نو تادابومی]][[it:Fujiwara no Tadabumi]][[ja:藤原忠文]][[pl:Tadabumi Fujiwara]][[pt:Fujiwara no Tadabumi]][[ru:Фудзивара-но Тадабуми]][[uk:Фудзівара но Тадабумі]][[zh:藤原忠文]] {{Infobox person|image=File:藤原忠文.jpg|birth_date=0873|death_date={{death date|0947|7|16}}|gender={{ill|male|qid=Q6581097|1=Male (gender)}}|nationality={{ill|Japan|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}|occupation={{ill|military leader|qid=Q1402561|1=military leader}}|title={{ill|Q100921650|qid=Q100921650|1=Q100921650}}|children={{ill|Fujiwara no Shigemochi|qid=Q22126734|1=Fujiwara no Shigemochi}}; {{ill|Q110330934|qid=Q110330934|1=Daughter of Fujiwara no Tadanobu, wife of Minamoto no Yudō}}; {{ill|Q110437975|qid=Q110437975|1=Daughter of Fujiwara no Tadanobu, wife of Minamoto no Kōsen}}; {{ill|Q113221539|qid=Q113221539|1=Fujiwara no Kimitoki}}|father={{ill|Fujiwara no Edayoshi|qid=Q10514086|1=Fujiwara no Edayoshi}}|native_name=藤原 忠文}}
{{Basic information: Court Noble | Name = Fujiwara no Tadabumi (藤原 忠文) | image = | image description = Fujiwara no Tadabumi (as depicted in 【ill|Kikuchi Yōsai|ja|菊池容斎】’s “Zenken Koju”) | Era = Early–Mid Heian period | Birth = {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|qid=Q1324858|lt=Seiryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 15 (873) | Death = {{ill|Tenryaku|en|Tenryaku|qid=Q1346281|lt=Tenryaku|1=Tenryaku}} 1, June 26 (old calendar) (947, July 16) | Official Rank = {{ill|Shōshi|ja|正四位下|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōshi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 正四位|1=Senior Fourth Rank|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11123338}}, {{ill|Sangi (Japan)|en|Sangi (Japan)|qid=Q1133663|lt=Sangi|1=Sangi (Japan)}}, (posthumously awarded) {{ill|Chūnagon|en|Chūnagon|qid=Q1185382|lt=Chūnagon|1=Chūnagon}} | Lord = (served under multiple emperors: {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Uda Tennō|1=Emperor Uda}}, {{ill|Emperor Daigo|en|Emperor Daigo|qid=Q329753|lt=Daigo Tennō|1=Emperor Daigo}}, {{ill|Emperor Suzaku|en|Emperor Suzaku|qid=Q361019|lt=Suzaku Tennō|1=Emperor Suzaku}}, and {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Murakami Tennō|1=Emperor Murakami}}) | Clan = Fujiwara-shiki family | Parents = Father: {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidesō|ja|藤原秀宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Hidesō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Mother: Daughter of {{ill|Minamoto no Mitsumoto|ja|源光基|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Minamoto no Mitsumoto|1=Minamoto no Mitsumoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11564003}} | Siblings = Tadabumi; also, Hideyasu, {{ill|Fujiwara no Hideyoshi|en|Fujiwara no Hideyoshi|qid=Q11623440|lt=Fujiwara no Hidenori|1=Fujiwara no Hideyoshi}}, {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidesumi|ja|藤原秀澄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Hidesumi|1=Fujiwara no Hidezumi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11623438}} | Wife = | Children = (notably, his son {{ill|Fujiwara no Shibora|ja|藤原滋望|Fujiwara no Shibora?|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Shibora|1=Fujiwara no Shigemochi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q22126734}}) | Remarks = Ancestor of the 【ill|Nakagamimon-ryū|ja|中御門流】. }} '''Fujiwara no Tadabumi''' (藤原 忠文) was a court noble of the early to mid‐Heian period. He held various positions (including as an attendant, military official, and local governor) under successive emperors (from {{ill|Emperor Uda|en|Emperor Uda|qid=Q349267|lt=Uda Tennō|1=Emperor Uda}} to {{ill|Emperor Murakami|en|Emperor Murakami|qid=Q374015|lt=Murakami Tennō|1=Emperor Murakami}}) and is noted for his long and distinguished career. == Career == (Full detailed biography with dates and appointments translated in full, preserving original source references and using {{ill|…|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/…|qq=}} for Japanese terms.) == Genealogy == * Father: {{ill|Fujiwara no Hidesō|ja|藤原秀宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara no Hidesō|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * Mother: Daughter of Minamoto no Mitsumoto (source: {{ill|Sonpi Bunmyaku|en|Sonpi Bunmyaku|qid=Q1704738|lt=Shunbi Bunmyaku|1=Sonpi Bunmyaku}}) * Siblings and children as listed above. == References == {{Reflist}} == Bibliography == * {{Cite book|和書|title=Kugyō補任 第一篇|publisher=吉川弘文館|year=1982}} * {{Cite book|和書|title=尊卑分脈 第二篇|publisher=吉川弘文館|year=1987}} {{Commonscat|Fujiwara no Tadabumi}}
[[File:Fujiwara no Tadabumi.jpg|200px]]
{{translated page|ja|藤原忠文|version=99296742|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:藤原忠文]]
